channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New lawsuit alleges U.S. shared asylum application details with Iran
item.description: A lawsuit claims the Trump administration is sharing details of Iranian asylum seekers with Iran's government.

item.title: There's no treatment designed for the Ebola strain ravaging DRC. But now there's hope
item.description: The current outbreak involves a strain with no specific treatments, but three new clinical trials offer potential breakthroughs.

item.title: International Olympic Committee lifts Russia suspension ahead of 2028 LA Games
item.description: The International Olympic Committee advised sports bodies to end a three-year program vetting Russians for neutral status ahead of qualifying events f...

item.title: Reigning champion Argentina escapes with remarkable World Cup victory over Egypt
item.description: Egypt was leading late, up 2-0. The Argentinians looked beaten. But they fought and fought and fought. Scoring one goal, then another to equalize. And...
